summarySection.summary: Sales professional with proven experience in customer communication and support, adept at driving revenue through effective outreach and relationship management. Skilled in managing customer interactions and ensuring satisfaction, ready to contribute to pipeline development and sales architecture.

experience.description:
• Spearheaded customer engagement as a Host at Hawkers, directly influencing ~35% of store sales through exceptional service and communication.
• Collaborated with kitchen and delivery teams to streamline operations, ensuring timely and accurate order fulfillment.
• Cultivated strong customer relationships, enhancing repeat business and overall customer satisfaction.

projects.description:
• Built and deployed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation, transaction tracking, and spending insights across a unified dashboard.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, enabling reliable transaction processing and normalized data storage.
• Developed responsive React dashboards and authentication flows for account management, transaction review, and financial analytics.
• Implemented authentication and secure data handling (OAuth/JWT), ensuring protected access to financial data and user account workflows.

warnings: Quality guard removed placeholder bullets from projects:9.
